channel.title: Hoodie on Possum Farm
channel.description: Recent content in Hoodie on Possum Farm

item.title: Play Dead Hoodie
item.description: We’ve all been there. The party is too loud. The group chat is too active. Your extended family has opinions about your life choices. You need a way out. The Play Dead Hoodie is that way out. Pull this hoodie on, pull the drawstring, and disappear like a possum who has correctly assessed the situation and chosen the sensible option. The soft fleece lining creates an interior environment that is, frankly, better than whatever is happening outside.
